title: Single-cell RNA sequencing data supporting the finding of Zhang et al., 2025, "HLA-A*03:01 as predictive genetic biomarker for glatiramer acetate treatment response in multiple sclerosis: a retrospective cohort analysis"
author: Schwab, Nicholas
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: These are the cellrange outputs of the single-cell RNA sequencing data of 5 glatiramer-acetate-treated MS patients supporting the findings of the manuscript "HLA-A*03:01 as predictive genetic biomarker for glatiramer acetate treatment response in multiple sclerosis: a retrospective cohort analysis" by Zhang et al..
steps_raw: These are the cellrange outputs of the single-cell RNA sequencing data of 5 glatiramer-acetate-treated MS patients supporting the findings of the manuscript "HLA-A*03:01 as predictive genetic biomarker for glatiramer acetate treatment response in multiple sclerosis: a retrospective cohort analysis" by Zhang et al..
